config.name: Treasury Stability: Reserve Deployment Policy
config.hypothesis: An intermediate treasury overflow threshold (0.30-0.50) maximizes population stability and minimizes inequality, while extremes — aggressive deployment or passive hoarding — degrade outcomes

findings: Treasury ratio: 0.0008 at aggressive deployment (0.10) vs 0.0010 at hoarding (0.90) (+19.4%)
Peak population stability at overflow_threshold = 0.30 (mean pop: 49.4)
Gini coefficient: 0.5419 at deployment (0.10) vs 0.5463 at hoarding (0.90) (+0.8%)
No collapses observed across entire threshold range
Mean fitness: 0.5456 at aggressive deployment vs 0.5394 at hoarding
Population volatility: 6.85 at deployment vs 6.79 at hoarding
Birth/death ratio: 1.1716 at deployment vs 1.1752 at hoarding
